---
title: Agent Skills
description: Ship agent-facing documentation alongside the component. Extracted with act skill.
---

A component can embed an [Agent Skill](https://github.com/actcore/act-spec/blob/main/spec/ACT-AGENTSKILLS.md) — markdown documentation aimed at an LLM agent that's about to call the component's tools. The skill is a `SKILL.md` file (with YAML frontmatter) plus optional supporting files, tar-packed into the `act:skill` WASM custom section.

## Layout

```
skill/
├── SKILL.md         # required, with frontmatter
├── EXAMPLES.md      # optional
└── references/…     # optional supporting files
```

## `SKILL.md`

```markdown
---
name: sqlite
description: Query a SQLite database. Useful for structured tabular data.
metadata:
  act: {}
---

# SQLite Component

Run SQL queries against a database file.

## Tools

### query
Execute a SQL statement. Returns JSON rows.

```
query(sql: "SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 10")
```
```

Frontmatter fields:

| Field | Required | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | ✓ | Slug, matches the component name |
| `description` | ✓ | One-line summary for the agent |
| `metadata.act` | ✓ | Must be `{}` — signals to skill consumers that this is an ACT skill |

## Build-time embedding

### Rust

```rust
act_sdk::embed_skill!("skill/");
```

Compile-time macro. Reads `skill/` at `build.rs` time, tars it, and emits the `act:skill` custom section via `#[link_section]`.

### Python

`act-build pack` picks up `skill/` automatically — no code change needed.

## Extract

```bash
act skill ghcr.io/actpkg/sqlite:latest -o .agents/skills/sqlite/
```

Writes the tar contents to the given directory. Agents can then use a skill-add workflow to pick up the documentation without ever running the component.
